testcase.name: test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event

self = <selenium.webdriver.support.wait.WebDriverWait (session="04afa43fedb5440c7b3fb8b2f008419a")> method = <function Page.assert_url_contains.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x7f3bdfbf4f40> message = ''
def until(self, method: Callable[[D], Literal[False] | T], message: str = "") -> T: """Wait until the method returns a value that is not False.
Calls the method provided with the driver as an argument until the return value does not evaluate to ``False``.
Args: method: A callable object that takes a WebDriver instance as an argument. message: Optional message for TimeoutException.
Returns: The result of the last call to `method`.
Raises: TimeoutException: If 'method' does not return a truthy value within the WebDriverWait object's timeout.
Example: >>> from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By >>> from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait >>> from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC >>> >>> # Wait until an element is visible on the page >>> wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10) >>> element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "exampleId"))) >>> print(element.text) """ screen = None stacktrace = None
end_time = time.monotonic() + self._timeout while True: try: value = method(self._driver) if value: return value except self._ignored_exceptions as exc: screen = getattr(exc, "screen", None) stacktrace = getattr(exc, "stacktrace", None) if time.monotonic() > end_time: break time.sleep(self._poll) > raise TimeoutException(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message:
end_time = 64435503.74786598 message = '' method = <function Page.assert_url_contains.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x7f3bdfbf4f40> screen = None self = <selenium.webdriver.support.wait.WebDriverWait (session="04afa43fedb5440c7b3fb8b2f008419a")> stacktrace = None value = False

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event.TestEviteGreetingCardCreateFromPastEvent object at 0x7f3bdfb96ba0> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f3bdf731a30>
def test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event(self, config): logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
evite_homepage = config.pages["evite_home_page"] page = config.pages["page"]
login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] evite_gallery_page = config.pages["evite_gallery_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_egift_card = config.pages["step2_egift_card"] step3_grc_messages = config.pages["step3_grc_messages"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
sql_string = ( f"SELECT user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title FROM public.evite_events WHERE " f"user_email_addr != 'automation_events@evitetest.com' AND " f"env = '{settings.ENV}' AND " f"event_premium = FALSE AND " f"event_draft_guests = FALSE AND " f"event_draft = FALSE AND " f"event_cancelled = FALSE AND " f"created_by = 'evite' AND " # f"event_create_date > now()::DATE AND " # f"event_sent_date < now()::DATE AND " f"event_create_date > '2023-04-01' AND " f"event_sent_date > '2023-04-01' AND " f"event_date < now()::DATE AND " f"event_date > now()::DATE-14 ORDER BY random() LIMIT 1;" ) # We have Thanks only for 14 days
page.get_url(config.environment, "")
user_email_addr = None user_pass = None user_first_name = None user_last_name = None event_title = None
# DB & API Connections quake_v3_account = QuakeV3Account(inspect.stack()[0][3]) quake_v3_user = QuakeV3User(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3]) db_connect = psql_db.connect_db()
try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string)
# Check result first, if no data then don't fail: Skip if cursor.rowcount: user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title = cursor.fetchone() else: logger.warning(f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}") config.test_failed["value"] = False pytest.skip("DB have no record for sql")
except psycopg.Error as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success")
# Check email length if len(user_email_addr) > 59: msg = "Email is 60+ characters" logger.error(msg) pytest.skip(msg)
# Get user's first and last name cursor = None sql_string = psql_db.get_select_from_table_string( settings.DB_TABLE_USERS, ["user_first_name", "user_last_name"], user_email_addr=user_email_addr ) try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string) if cursor.rowcount: user_first_name, user_last_name = cursor.fetchone() else: config.test_failed["value"] = False msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warning(msg) pytest.skip(msg) except psycopg.Error as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success") finally: if cursor: cursor.close() if db_connect: db_connect.close()
# Need for payment page self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = f"{user_first_name} {user_last_name}"
# LogIn through the API sign_in_response = quake_v3_account.account_session_sign_in(email_address=user_email_addr, password=user_pass)
# Get All Past Events past_events_response = quake_v3_user.get_past_events( user_id=sign_in_response.json()["message"]["user_id"], session_id=sign_in_response.json()["message"]["token"], )
# Go through the list of events and get one that is not a card or draft event, and hosted by the user past_event = None for event in past_events_response.json()["message"]["events"]: if event["guest_status"] == 1 and event["used_as"] == "invitation": past_event = event logger.info(f"Found a past event: {event['title']}, ID {event['event_id']}") break
# Skip the rest of the test if no qualifying event was found if not past_event: msg = "Could not find a past event with this user." logger.info(f"{msg}") pytest.skip(msg)
# LogIn login_modal.sign_in(email=user_email_addr, password=user_pass) evite_homepage.select_logged_in_menu(action="events")
my_events.select_event_options( event_title=event_title, event_option="send_thanks", event_status="You hosted", url="cards" )
evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(greeting_card=True)
# Skipped until sorted: https://evitetracking.atlassian.net/browse/EVT-38304 # step1_template.select_next(url="egift-card")
> step1_template.select_next(url="recipients")

self = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7f3bdf733fb0> search_string = 'recipients'
def assert_url_contains(self, search_string): """ Verify the current url contains the passed in string :param search_string: :return: """ screen_shot_helper = ScreenShotHelper(self.test_name) search_string = search_string.lower()
try: WebDriverWait(self.selenium, self.timeout).until( lambda s: search_string in self.selenium.current_url.lower() ) self.logger.info("Verified URL contains: %s", search_string) except TimeoutException: screen_shot_helper.take_screen_shot(self.selenium) current_url = self.selenium.current_url > assert False, f"Can't verify page url contains {search_string}, current url: {current_url}" E AssertionError: Can't verify page url contains recipients, current url: https://test46.evitelabs.com/card/0127IIAE4SKDAA3XQEPREFLNCDAKJY/egift-card?v=&c=thankyou_cards&previous=thankyou_cards&page=1&invitation_type=card&category_id=thankyou_cards&pos=6
